# New Zealand Coastal LiDAR 1m DEM (LINZ) — CC-BY-4.0. 373 bare-earth +
# seabed COG tiles (EPSG:2193, NZVD2016, LERC), one per line, harvested from the
# public STAC catalog. Generated by harvest.py — re-run it when LINZ publishes new
# coastal surveys (3D Coastal Mapping programme, through mid-2027).
